creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
I've come to think that uploaded patch would be correct as...

 *There are 59 ports under devel/ which has pep517 in USE_PYTHON
  and py-setuptools* in Makefile*.

 *There are no ports under devel/ which has pep517 in USE_PYTHON
  and distutils in Makefile*.
  (Excluding 1 noise that has USE_PYTHON=pep517 in comment.)

 *At least some ports dropped distutils when switching to pep517.


The search is done with commands below.
Possibly one of variants of devel/py-setuptools* is better, but went OK with devel/py-setuptools for me.


% rg "USE_PYTHON" /usr/ports/devel/ | rg "pep517" | cut -f 1 -w | cut -f 1 -d : | sort -u | xargs -n 1 fgrep -H "setuptools" | cut -f 1 -d : | uniq | wc
      59      59    2433

% rg "USE_PYTHON" /usr/ports/devel/ | rg "pep517" | cut -f 1 -w | cut -f 1 -d : | sort -u | xargs -n 1 fgrep -H "distutils" | cut -f 1 -d : | uniq | wc
       1       1      48

Note that 1 result of 1st commands is patched devel/py-QtPy.
After the 2nd commands, to be sure it's a noise or not,

% rg "USE_PYTHON" /usr/ports/devel/ | rg "pep517" | cut -f 1 -w | cut -f 1 -d : | sort -u | xargs -n 1 fgrep -H "distutils"
/usr/ports/devel/py-importlib-metadata/Makefile:USE_PYTHON=     distutils autoplist pytest

Read /usr/ports/devel/py-importlib-metadata/Makefile and found pep517 appears in a comment only at line 32.

pre-configure: # importlib-metadata introduces circular dependency when built with USE_PYTHON=pep517, see bug#269363
